TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Bashar_al-Assad, title = Bashar_al-Assad, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bashar_al-Assad} }

S.FORM: == Bashar al-Assad == ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 9, Bashar al-Assad, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1965) mrhuw Syria ta' misuw hya' ga Bashar al-Assad, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2000 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Bashar al-Assad htagan beh sa Syria Damascus,maki ryax tay 11 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 1965. te sazing mlikuy laqi ru te cyugal laqi,Anisa Makhlouf ru Hafez al-Assad lalu nya. kawas tay 1927,yugun nya lalu nya. al-Assad pincbaq mqwas biru maki Arab,French ru al-Hurriya pqwasan biru. kawas tay 1982,tmasot gocyu pqwasan biru lga,mqaws biru beh Damascus hopa pqwasan biru. kawas tay 1988,tmosat pkita nbu hopa pqwasan biru,aring Tishrin Mhetay zyaw byoing maki Damascus praw sinsiy phgup. Bashar al-Assad sraral ga pcbaq maki Franco-Arab al-Hurriyah pqwasan biru.baq balay kmal ke na ego. kawas tay 2000 byacing tay 12 maki bes na Rsma al-Assad. maki sazing mlikuy laqi ru qutux kneril laqi. te qutux laqi Hafez al-Assad lalu nya,tnaq lalu yutas nya.kawas tay 2003 htagan na ryax,hiya ga kneril laqi Zein lalu nya.kawas tay 2004 htagan na ryax,hiya ga te sazing mlikuy laqi Karim lalu nya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Bashar al-Assad == ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 9, Bashar al-Assad, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1965) mrhuw Syria ta' misuw hya' ga Bashar al-Assad, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2000 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Bashar al-Assad htagan beh sa Syria Damascus,maki ryax tay 11 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 1965. te sazing mlikuy laqi ru te cyugal laqi,Anisa Makhlouf ru Hafez al-Assad lalu nya. kawas tay 1927,yugun nya lalu nya. al-Assad pincbaq mqwas biru maki Arab,French ru al-Hurriya pqwasan biru. kawas tay 1982,tmasot gocyu pqwasan biru lga,mqaws biru beh Damascus hopa pqwasan biru. kawas tay 1988,tmosat pkita nbu hopa pqwasan biru,aring Tishrin Mhetay zyaw byoing maki Damascus praw sinsiy phgup. Bashar al-Assad sraral ga pcbaq maki Franco-Arab al-Hurriyah pqwasan biru.baq balay kmal ke na ego. kawas tay 2000 byacing tay 12 maki bes na Rsma al-Assad. maki sazing mlikuy laqi ru qutux kneril laqi. te qutux laqi Hafez al-Assad lalu nya,tnaq lalu yutas nya.kawas tay 2003 htagan na ryax,hiya ga kneril laqi Zein lalu nya.kawas tay 2004 htagan na ryax,hiya ga te sazing mlikuy laqi Karim lalu nya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minД§tuw s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) mrД§uw s~Й•jria taК” mis~Й•uw Д§jaК” ЙЈa ОІas~Й•Д§ar al-as~Й•s~Й•a*, ariЕ‹ rjax taj ** s~Й•qu ОІjaК¦~КЁiЕ‹ taj * s~Й•a kawas~Й• **** lЙЈa, mus~Й•aК” s~Й•pazjaЕ‹ ОІalaj ms~Й•К”rux kja la. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) ОІas~Й•Д§ar al-as~Й•s~Й•a* Д§taЙЈan ОІeД§ s~Й•a s~Й•jria *amas~Й•К¦~КЁus~Й•,maki rjax taj ** s~Й•qu ОІjaК¦~КЁiЕ‹ taj * s~Й•a kawas~Й• ****. te s~Й•aziЕ‹ mlikuj laqi ru te К¦~КЁjuЙЈal laqi,anis~Й•a makД§lou* ru Д§a*ez al-as~Й•s~Й•a* lalu nja. kawas~Й• taj ****,juЙЈun nja lalu nja. al-as~Й•s~Й•a* pinК¦~КЁОІaq mqwas~Й• ОІiru maki araОІ,*renК¦~КЁД§ ru al-Д§urrija pqwas~Й•an ОІiru. kawas~Й• taj ****,tmas~Й•ot ЙЈoК¦~КЁju pqwas~Й•an ОІiru lЙЈa,mqaws~Й• ОІiru ОІeД§ *amas~Й•К¦~КЁus~Й• Д§opa pqwas~Й•an ОІiru. kawas~Й• taj ****,tmos~Й•at pkita nОІu Д§opa pqwas~Й•an ОІiru,ariЕ‹ tis~Й•Д§rin mД§etaj zjaw ОІjoiЕ‹ maki *amas~Й•К¦~КЁus~Й• praw s~Й•ins~Й•ij pД§ЙЈup. ОІas~Й•Д§ar al-as~Й•s~Й•a* s~Й•raral ЙЈa pК¦~КЁОІaq maki *ranК¦~КЁo-araОІ al-Д§urrijaД§ pqwas~Й•an ОІiru.ОІaq ОІalaj kmal ke na eЙЈo. kawas~Й• taj **** ОІjaК¦~КЁiЕ‹ taj ** maki ОІes~Й• na rs~Й•ma al-as~Й•s~Й•a*. maki s~Й•aziЕ‹ mlikuj laqi ru qutux kneril laqi. te qutux laqi Д§a*ez al-as~Й•s~Й•a* lalu nja,tnaq lalu jutas~Й• nja.kawas~Й• taj **** Д§taЙЈan na rjax,Д§ija ЙЈa kneril laqi zein lalu nja.kawas~Й• taj **** Д§taЙЈan na rjax,Д§ija ЙЈa te s~Й•aziЕ‹ mlikuj laqi karim lalu nja. К¦~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК”
